title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use any LangChain abstraction with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed open-webui); supports RAG, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, streaming, embeddings, and custom timeouts.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Lightweight Node CLI wrapper around Ollama HTTP API for quick chats and pulls.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for Ollama; supports generate, chat, embeddings, and listing models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacements.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models in Haystack pipelines for RAG & QA.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Collection of copy-paste curl snippets for every Ollama REST endpoint.

title: ollama-ui
summary: Minimal Flask web UI for chatting with Ollama models; no build step, single Python file.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama containerized with GPU support.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that sends selected blocks to local Ollama models for summarization or Q&A.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats and generates images using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run local LLM prompts inside your vault via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that forwards channel messages to Ollama and streams replies back.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client for Ollama; demonstrates HTTP streaming and JSON parsing in Zig.
